memoryArtifacts.headline: William Learned - Information in the book "History of Woburn" published in 1868
memoryArtifacts.description: Martin Egbert, a 10th Great Grandson of William Learned bought this book in the Woburn City Library in March 2013.  Some interesting information about William Learned and the founding of Woburn

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Learned於1590年1月1日出生在英國素瑞貝爾蒙時，他的父親Sampson Learned40歲，母親Eleanor Creswell31歲。他於1606年4月22日與Goodith Gillman在英國英格蘭素瑞聖 奧拉福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1646年3月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年56歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Learned于1590年1月1日出生在英国素瑞貝爾蒙时，他的父亲Sampson Learned40岁，母亲Eleanor Creswell31岁。他于1606年4月22日与Goodith Gillman在英国英格兰素瑞聖 奧拉福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1646年3月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年56岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Learned
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Leonard  . An intermediate stage in this change is   Learnard  . Compare   Larned  .

History: William Learned was admitted to the First Church in Charlestown, MA, in 1632, and in 1640 was one of the first settlers of Woburn, MA. One of his better known descendants, Ebenezer, a revolutionary war officer, was born at Oxford, MA, in 1728.

variants.name: Leonard
meanings: English; French (Léonard); Walloon (mainly Léonard): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements leo ‘lion’ (a late addition to the vocabulary of ancient Germanic name elements, taken from Latin) + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, which was taken to England by the Normans. A Christian saint of this name, who is supposed to have lived in the 6th century, but about whom nothing is known except for a largely fictional life dating from half a millennium later, was popular throughout Europe in the early Middle Ages and was regarded as the patron of peasants and horses. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Leonardo , Polish, Slovenian, etc. Lenart or Lenard , and probably also their derivatives. Compare Larned , Learned , and Yenor .
Irish (Fermanagh): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Fhionáin or of Langan .
German: variant of   Leonhard  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Larned
meanings: Variant of   Learned  , itself an altered form of English   Leonard  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Learned was born on 1 January 1590, in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, his father, Sampson Learned, was 40 and his mother, Eleanor Creswell, was 31. He married Goodith Gillman on 22 April 1606, in St Olave, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died on 1 March 1646, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 56, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Il a épousé Goodith Gillman le 22 avril 1606, à St Olave, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 1 mars 1646, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Learned am 1. Januar 1590 in Bermondsey, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sampson Learned 40 und seine Mutter Eleanor Creswell 31. Er hat am 22. April 1606 in St Olave, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Goodith Gillman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 1. März 1646 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Learned è nato il il 1 gennaio 1590 nel Bermondsey, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Sampson Learned, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Creswell, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Goodith Gillman il 22 aprile 1606, nel St Olave, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì il 1 marzo 1646, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Learnedが1590年1月1日にイギリススリーバーモンドセイで生まれた時，父Sampson Learnedは40歳，母Eleanor Creswellは31歳であった。1606年4月22日にイギリスイギリススリースト オラブでGoodith Gillmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1646年3月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで56歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: William Learned(이)가 1590년 1월 1일 영국 수리 버몽시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sampson Learned(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Creswell(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1606년 4월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 스트 올레이브에서 Goodith Gillman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1646년 3월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Learned nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1590, em Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sampson Learned, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Creswell, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Goodith Gillman em 22 de abril de 1606, em St Olave, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de março de 1646, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Learned родился 1 января 1590 г. в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Sampson Learned было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Creswell, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Goodith Gillman 22 апреля 1606 г. в местности ст олав, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер 1 марта 1646 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Learned nació el 1 de enero de 1590, en Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Sampson Learned, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Eleanor Creswell, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Goodith Gillman el 22 de abril de 1606, en St Olave, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1646, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
